summary: Excellent test suite with comprehensive coverage across all major requirements: Cartesian product generation, exclude rules, include rules (merge vs. add behavior), strategy configuration (fail-fast, max-parallel), size validation, JSON output format, and config parsing. Edge cases are well-covered including empty matrices, exclude-all scenarios, include-only configurations, duplicate values, special characters, realistic end-to-end scenarios, and error conditions (null config, empty dimensions, invalid JSON, missing matrix key). Test files are logically organized by concern with clear naming and comments explaining TDD intent. Fixtures are simple and self-contained — no shared mutable state, each test is independent. Minor gaps: no test for max-parallel=0 being excluded from JSON output (the implementation omits it but tests only check null), and boundary behavior around the include-merge logic when an include partially overlaps multiple combinations simultaneously could be more thoroughly explored. The 'MaxParallel_ZeroValue_TreatedAsNoLimit' test passes the value through but doesn't verify JSON omission. Overall a trustworthy regression suite.
